title: plugin-agent-copilot:plugin-agent
description: Copilot agent plugin stub. Provides the interface structure for future full implementation.
context: Copilot agent plugin stub. Provides the interface structure for future full implementation.

rules: The package MUST export `create(): AgentPlugin` as default or named export.

This is a stub for phase 2. The implementation MUST return a valid `AgentPlugin` that:

- Has `type: 'agent'`
- Has a descriptive name and version
- Has an empty or minimal `configSchema`

When implemented in phase 2:

- Will depend on `skills:skill-repository` for skill access
- Will install to the appropriate Copilot skills directory
- Will inject Copilot-specific metadata during install

constraints: This is a placeholder/stub for phase 1.
Full implementation is deferred to phase 2.

scenarios.name: Returns valid AgentPlugin
then: it returns an AgentPlugin with type 'agent'
